title: Luxembourg's Quantum Technologies Strategy
summary: National quantum technologies strategy issued by the Luxembourg Ministry of State, setting a roadmap toward secure quantum networks and explicitly addressing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as a quantum-resistant solution integrable with existing systems.

title: Public consultation on the European Union roadmap for the transition to post-quantum cryptography
summary: Luxembourg government digital-trust portal announcement of a public consultation on the EU roadmap for transition to post-quantum cryptography, noting the recommendation that critical use cases migrate to PQC by end-2030 at the latest.

title: Quantum Communication in Luxembourg (factsheet)
summary: Official Luxembourg government factsheet outlining the national quantum strategy roadmap (Phase 1 2025-2027, Phase 2 2027-2030, Phase 3) for quantum communication infrastructure. PQC reference is not explicit in the available snippet, so flagged for human review.
